original: 9 . Vipassanākathā
content: 9.毘婆舍那的談論

original: 36. Evaṃ me sutaṃ– ekaṃ samayaṃ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṃ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme.
content: [[evaṃ me sutaṃ#被我這麼聽聞]]：[[ekaṃ samayaṃ#有一次]]，[[bhagavā#世尊]]住在舍衛城祇樹林給孤獨園。

original: Tatra kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi–
content: 在那裡，世尊召喚[[bhikkhu#比丘]]們：「比丘們！」

original: ‘‘ bhikkhavo’’ ti.
content: 「比丘們！」

original: ‘‘ Bhadante’’ ti te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṃ.
content: 「[[bhadante#尊師]]！」那些比丘回答世尊。

original: Bhagavā etadavoca–
content: 世尊說這個：

original: ‘ ‘ So vata, bhikkhave, bhikkhu kañci[ kiñci( ka.) a. ni.6.99-100 passitabbā] saṅkhāraṃ niccato samanupassanto anulomikāya khantiyā samannāgato bhavissatīti– netaṃ ṭhānaṃ vijjati;
content: 「比丘們！那位比丘『認為任何行為常者將具備隨順接受。』[[netaṃ ṭhānaṃ vijjati#這不存在可能性]]，『不具備隨順接受者將進入[[sammattaniyāma#正性決定]]。』這不存在可能性，

original: anulomikāya khantiyā asamannāgato sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamissatīti– netaṃ ṭhānaṃ vijjati;
content: 『不具備隨順接受者將進入[[sammattaniyāma#正性決定]]。』這不存在可能性，

original: sammattaniyāmaṃ anokkamamāno sotāpattiphalaṃ vā sakadāgāmiphalaṃ vā anāgāmiphalaṃ vā arahattaṃ vā[ arahattaphalaṃ vā( syā. ka.) a. ni.6.98 passitabbā] sacchikarissatīti– netaṃ ṭhānaṃ vijjati.
content: 『不進入正性決定者將作證[[sotāpanno#入流果]]或[[sakadāgāmi#一來果]]或[[anāgāmi#不還果]]或[[arahaṃ#阿羅漢果]]。』這不存在可能性。

original: ‘ ‘ So vata, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sabbasaṅkhāre aniccato samanupassanto anulomikāya khantiyā samannāgato bhavissatīti– ṭhānametaṃ vijjati;
content: 比丘們！那位比丘『認為一切行為無常者將具備隨順接受。』這存在可能性，

original: anulomikāya khantiyā samannāgato sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamissatīti– ṭhānametaṃ vijjati, sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamamāno sotāpattiphalaṃ vā sakadāgāmiphalaṃ vā anāgāmiphalaṃ vā arahattaṃ vā sacchikarissatīti– ṭhānametaṃ vijjati.
content: 『具備隨順接受者將進入正性決定。』這存在可能性，『進入正性決定者將作證入流果或一來果或不還果或阿羅漢果。』這存在可能性。[AN.6.98]

original: ‘ ‘ So vata, bhikkhave, bhikkhu kañci saṅkhāraṃ sukhato samanupassanto anulomikāya khantiyā samannāgato bhavissatīti– netaṃ ṭhānaṃ vijjati;
content: 比丘們！那位比丘『認為任何行為樂者將具備隨順接受。』這不存在可能性，

original: anulomikāya khantiyā asamannāgato sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamissatīti – netaṃ ṭhānaṃ vijjati;
content: 『不具備隨順接受者將進入正性決定。』這不存在可能性，

original: sammattaniyāmaṃ anokkamamāno sotāpattiphalaṃ vā sakadāgāmiphalaṃ vā anāgāmiphalaṃ vā arahattaṃ vā sacchikarissatīti– netaṃ ṭhānaṃ vijjati .
content: 『不進入正性決定者將作證入流果或一來果或不還果或阿羅漢果。』這不存在可能性。

original: ‘ ‘ So vata, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sabbasaṅkhāre dukkhato samanupassanto anulomikāya khantiyā samannāgato bhavissatīti– ṭhānametaṃ vijjati;
content: 比丘們！那位比丘『認為一切行為苦者將具備隨順接受。』這存在可能性，

original: anulomikāya khantiyā samannāgato sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamissatīti– ṭhānametaṃ vijjati;
content: 『具備隨順接受者將進入正性決定。』這存在可能性，

original: sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamamāno sotāpattiphalaṃ vā sakadāgāmiphalaṃ vā anāgāmiphalaṃ vā arahattaṃ vā sacchikarissatīti– ṭhānametaṃ vijjati.
content: 『進入正性決定者將作證入流果或一來果或不還果或阿羅漢果。』這存在可能性。」這存在可能性。[AN.6.99]

original: ‘ ‘ So vata, bhikkhave, bhikkhu kañci dhammaṃ attato samanupassanto anulomikāya khantiyā samannāgato bhavissatīti– netaṃ ṭhānaṃ vijjati;
content: 比丘們！那位比丘『認為任何法為真我者將具備隨順接受。』這不存在可能性，

original: anulomikāya khantiyā asamannāgato sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamissatīti– netaṃ ṭhānaṃ vijjati;
content: 『不具備隨順接受者將進入正性決定。』這不存在可能性，

original: sammattaniyāmaṃ anokkamamāno sotāpattiphalaṃ vā sakadāgāmiphalaṃ vā anāgāmiphalaṃ vā arahattaṃ vā sacchikarissatīti– netaṃ ṭhānaṃ vijjati.
content: 『不進入正性決定者將作證入流果或一來果或不還果或阿羅漢果。』這不存在可能性。

original: ‘ ‘ So vata, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sabbadhamme[ kañci dhammaṃ( syā.), kiñci dhammaṃ( ka.) a. ni.6.100 passitabbā] anattato samanupassanto anulomikāya khantiyā samannāgato bhavissatīti– ṭhānametaṃ vijjati;
content: 比丘們！那位比丘『認為一切法為無我者將具備隨順接受。』這存在可能性，

original: anulomikāya khantiyā samannāgato sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamissatīti– ṭhānametaṃ vijjati;
content: 『具備隨順接受者將進入正性決定。』這存在可能性，

original: sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamamāno sotāpattiphalaṃ vā sakadāgāmiphalaṃ vā anāgāmiphalaṃ vā arahattaṃ vā sacchikarissatīti– ṭhānametaṃ vijjati.
content: 『進入正性決定者將作證入流果或一來果或不還果或阿羅漢果。』這存在可能性。」這存在可能性。[AN.6.100]

original: ‘ ‘ So vata, bhikkhave, bhikkhu nibbānaṃ dukkhato samanupassanto anulomikāya khantiyā samannāgato bhavissatīti– netaṃ ṭhānaṃ vijjati;
content: 「比丘們！那位比丘『認為涅槃為苦者將具備隨順接受。』這不存在可能性，

original: anulomikāya khantiyā asamannāgato sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamissatīti– netaṃ ṭhānaṃ vijjati;
content: 『不具備隨順接受者將進入正性決定。』這不存在可能性，

original: sammattaniyāmaṃ anokkamamāno sotāpattiphalaṃ vā sakadāgāmiphalaṃ vā anāgāmiphalaṃ vā arahattaṃ vā sacchikarissatīti– netaṃ ṭhānaṃ vijjati.
content: 『不進入正性決定者將作證入流果或一來果或不還果或阿羅漢果。』這不存在可能性。

original: ‘ ‘ So vata, bhikkhave, bhikkhu nibbānaṃ sukhato samanupassanto anulomikāya khantiyā samannāgato bhavissatīti– ṭhānametaṃ vijjati;
content: 比丘們！那位比丘『認為涅槃為樂者將具備隨順接受。』這存在可能性，

original: anulomikāya khantiyā samannāgato sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamissatīti– ṭhānametaṃ vijjati;
content: 『具備隨順接受者將進入正性決定。』這存在可能性，

original: sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamamāno sotāpattiphalaṃ vā sakadāgāmiphalaṃ vā anāgāmiphalaṃ vā arahattaṃ vā sacchikarissatīti– ṭhānametaṃ vijjati’’.
content: 『進入正性決定者將作證入流果或一來果或不還果或阿羅漢果。』這存在可能性。[AN.6.101]

original: 37. Katihākārehi anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati, katihākārehi sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati?
content: 37.以多少行相得到隨順接受？以多少行相進入正性決定？

original: Cattārīsāya ākārehi anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati, cattārīsāya ākārehi sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 以四十行相得到隨順接受，以四十行相進入正性決定。

original: Katamehi cattārīsāya ākārehi anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati, katamahi cattārīsāya ākārehi sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati?
content: 以哪四十行相得到隨順接受，以哪四十行相進入正性決定？

original: Pañcakkhandhe aniccato dukkhato rogato gaṇḍato sallato aghato ābādhato parato palokato ītito upaddavato bhayato upasaggato calato pabhaṅguto[ pabhaṅgato( syā.)] addhuvato atāṇato[ attāṇato( syā.)] aleṇato asaraṇato rittato tucchato suññato anattato ādīnavato vipariṇāmadhammato asārakato aghamūlato vadhakato vibhavato sāsavato saṅkhatato mārāmisato jātidhammato jarādhammato byādhidhammato maraṇadhammato sokadhammato paridevadhammato upāyāsadhammato saṃkilesikadhammato.
content: [視]五蘊為無常的、苦的、病、腫瘤、箭、禍、疾病、[[parato#另一邊的]]、敗壞、災難、禍害、恐怖、災禍、搖動的、易壞的、不堅固的、無庇護所、無避難所、無歸依所、被捨的、虛偽的、空的、無我的、[[ādīnavo#過患]]、[[vipariṇāmadhammaṃ/vipariṇāmadhammatā#變易法]]、不實的、不幸的根、殺害者、無有的、有[[avassuto#漏]]的、[[saṅkhatā#有為的]]、魔的餌、生法、老法、病法、死法、愁法、悲泣法、絕望法、污染法。

original: 38. Pañcakkhandhe aniccato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 38.當看五蘊為無常的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho niccaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為常的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe dukkhato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為苦的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho sukhaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為樂的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe rogato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為病的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho ārogyaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無病的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe gaṇḍato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為腫瘤的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho agaṇḍaṃ[ nigaṇḍo( syā.)] nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無腫瘤的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe sallato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為箭的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho visallaṃ[ nissallaṃ( syā.)] nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為離箭的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe aghato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為禍的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho anagho nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無禍的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe ābādhato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為疾病的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho anābādho nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無疾病的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe parato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為另一邊的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho aparappaccayaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為非另一邊的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe palokato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為敗壞的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho apalokadhammo nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無敗壞的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe ītito passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為災難的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho anītikaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無災難的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe upaddavato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為禍害的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho anupaddavaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無禍害的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe bhayato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為恐怖時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho abhayaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無恐怖涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe upasaggato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為災禍時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho anupasaggaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無災禍涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe calato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為移動的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho acalaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為不移動的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe pabhaṅguto passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為易壞的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho apabhaṅgu[ appabhaṅgaṃ( syā.)] nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為非易壞的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe addhuvato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為不堅固的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho dhuvaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為堅固的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe atāṇato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為無庇護所時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho tāṇaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為庇護所的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe aleṇato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為無避難所時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho leṇaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為避難所的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe asaraṇato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為無歸依所時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho saraṇaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為歸依所的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe rittato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為被捨的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho arittaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為不被捨的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe tucchato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為虛偽的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho atucchaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無虛偽的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe suññato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為空的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho paramasuññaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為最上空的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe anattato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為無我的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho paramatthaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為最上義的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe ādīnavato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為過患時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho anādīnavaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無過患涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe vipariṇāmadhammato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為變易法時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho avipariṇāmadhammaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為不變易法涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe asārakato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為非核心(不實)的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho sāraṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為核心的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe aghamūlato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為不幸的根時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho anaghamūlaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為非不幸的根之涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe vadhakato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為殺害者時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho avadhakaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為非殺害者之涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe vibhavato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為無有的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho avibhavaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為非無有的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe sāsavato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為有漏的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho anāsavaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無煩惱的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe saṅkhatato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為有為的時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho asaṅkhataṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無為的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe mārāmisato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為魔食(餌)時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho nirāmisaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為精神的(無食物味道的)涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe jātidhammato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為生法時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho ajātaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為不被生的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe jarādhammato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為老法時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho ajaraṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為不被老的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe byādhidhammato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為病法時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho abyādhi[ abyādhidhammaṃ( syā.)] nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無病的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe maraṇadhammato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為死法時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho amataṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為不死的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe sokadhammato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為愁法時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho asokaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無愁的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe paridevadhammato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為悲泣法時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho aparidevaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無悲泣的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe upāyāsadhammato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為絕望法時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho anupāyāsaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無絕望的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: Pañcakkhandhe saṃkilesikadhammato passanto anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 當看五蘊為污染法時得到隨順接受，

original: Pañcannaṃ khandhānaṃ nirodho asaṃkiliṭṭhaṃ nibbānanti passanto sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 當看「五蘊滅為無污染的涅槃」時進入正性決定。

original: 39. Aniccatoti, aniccānupassanā.
content: 39.「為無常的」是無常隨看，

original: Dukkhatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為苦的」是苦隨看，

original: Rogatoti , dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為病的」是苦隨看，

original: Gaṇḍatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為腫瘤的」是苦隨看，

original: Sallatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為箭的」是苦隨看，

original: Aghatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為禍的」是苦隨看，

original: Ābādhatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為疾病的」是苦隨看，

original: Paratoti, anattānupassanā.
content: 「為另一邊的」是無我隨看，

original: Palokatoti, aniccānupassanā.
content: 「為敗壞的」是無常隨看，

original: Ītitoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為災難的」是苦隨看。

original: Upaddavatoti , dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為禍害的」是苦隨看，

original: Bhayatoti, dukkhānupassanā .
content: 「為恐怖」是苦隨看，

original: Upasaggatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為災禍」是苦隨看，

original: Calatoti, aniccānupassanā.
content: 「為移動的」是無常隨看，

original: Pabhaṅgutoti, aniccānupassanā.
content: 「為易壞的」是無常隨看，

original: Addhuvatoti, aniccānupassanā.
content: 「為不堅固的」是無常隨看，

original: Atāṇatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為無庇護所」是苦隨看，

original: Aleṇatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為無避難所」是苦隨看，

original: Asaraṇatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為無歸依所」是苦隨看，

original: Rittatoti, anattānupassanā.
content: 「為被捨的」是無我隨看。

original: Tucchatoti , anattānupassanā.
content: 「為虛偽的」是無我隨看，

original: Suññatoti, anattānupassanā.
content: 「為空的」是無我隨看，

original: Anattatoti , anattānupassanā.
content: 「為無我的」是無我隨看，

original: Ādīnavatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為過患」是苦隨看，

original: Vipariṇāmadhammatoti, aniccānupassanā.
content: 「為變易法」是無常隨看，

original: Asārakatoti, anattānupassanā.
content: 「為不實的」是無我隨看，

original: Aghamūlatoti , dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為不幸的根」是苦隨看，

original: Vadhakatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為殺害者」是苦隨看，

original: Vibhavatoti, aniccānupassanā.
content: 「為非有的」是無常隨看，

original: Sāsavatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為有漏的」是苦隨看。

original: Saṅkhatatoti , aniccānupassanā.
content: 「為有為的」是無常隨看，

original: Mārāmisatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為魔食(餌)」是苦隨看，

original: Jātidhammatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為生法」是苦隨看，

original: Jarādhammatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為老法」是苦隨看，

original: Byādhidhammatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為病法」是苦隨看，

original: Maraṇadhammatoti, aniccānupassanā.
content: 「為死法」是無常隨看，

original: Sokadhammatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為愁法」是苦隨看，

original: Paridevadhammatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為悲泣法」是苦隨看，

original: Upāyāsadhammatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為絕望法」是苦隨看，

original: Saṃkilesikadhammatoti, dukkhānupassanā.
content: 「為污染法」是苦隨看。

original: Imehi cattālīsāya ākārehi anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhati.
content: 以這四十行相得到隨順接受，

original: Imehi cattālīsāya ākārehi sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamati.
content: 以這四十行相進入正性決定。

original: Imehi cattālīsāya ākārehi anulomikaṃ khantiṃ paṭilabhantassa, imehi cattālīsāya ākārehi sammattaniyāmaṃ okkamantassa kati aniccānupassanā, kati dukkhānupassanā, kati anattānupassanā?
content: 對以這四十行相得到隨順接受；對以這四十行相進入正性決定有多少無常隨看？有多少苦隨看？有多少無我隨看？

original: Pañcavīsati anattānupassanā, paññāsa aniccānupassanā;
content: 有二十五無我隨看、五十無常隨看、

original: Sataṃ pañcavīsati ceva, yāni dukkhe pavuccareti.
content: 一百二十五被稱為在苦上的。

original: Vipassanākathā niṭṭhitā.
content: 毘婆舍那的談論終了。
